instruction: Help me organize the inventory status

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Product'
ws['B1'] = 'Stock(pcs)'
ws['C1'] = 'Safety Stock(pcs)'
ws['A2'] = 'Phone Case A'
ws['B2'] = 45
ws['C2'] = 50
ws['A3'] = 'Power Bank B'
ws['B3'] = 120
ws['C3'] = 30
ws['A4'] = 'USB Cable C'
ws['B4'] = 18
ws['C4'] = 40
ws['A5'] = 'Earphone D'
ws['B5'] = 200
ws['C5'] = 60
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/inventory.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the inventory status
Find products with stock below safety stock from /home/user/Desktop/inventory.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/stock_alert.txt: 'Stock Alert: Phone Case A, USB Cable C', save

include: Stock Alert: Phone Case A, USB Cable C
